title: Wasp Removal in Travis, Staten Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Travis, Staten Island. Safe nest elimination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now: $350-$550.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert wasp removal services throughout Travis, Staten Island, protecting homes and businesses from dangerous stinging insects. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from properties near the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and throughout this residential neighborhood. We offer fast, effective wasp control with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest location and severity.
whyUs: Our Travis wasp removal specialists respond quickly to protect your family and property from aggressive wasps. We use proven, eco-friendly methods to eliminate nests and prevent future infestations, with same-day service available for emergency situations throughout Staten Island's western shore communities.
localContext: Travis's mix of single-family homes, wooded areas near the Fresh Kills wetlands, and proximity to the wildlife refuge creates ideal conditions for wasp nesting in eaves, attics, and yard structures. The neighborhood's quiet residential streets and abundant vegetation make professional wasp removal essential for maintaining safe outdoor spaces during warmer months.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Travis typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest size, location accessibility, and number of nests. Ground nests and easily accessible eave nests are generally at the lower end, while high roof peaks or interior wall nests may cost more due to additional labor and equipment required.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Travis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service in Travis for emergency situations. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours of arrival. Our technicians arrive fully equipped to safely eliminate nests and treat the area to prevent wasps from returning to the site.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Travis residents commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in ground holes or wall voids, paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and decks, and bald-faced hornets create large grey nests in trees and shrubs throughout the neighborhood's wooded areas.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for pets and children in Travis homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use targeted treatments that eliminate wasps at their source while minimizing environmental impact. Our technicians will advise you on any necessary precautions, such as keeping pets and children indoors during treatment, and the area is safe for normal activity shortly after service completion.
